doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document purports to be from a future date (March 2026), misattributes a 2014 guidance to the EDPB (which was established in 2018), and adopts an implausibly radical position removing pseudonymized data from GDPR scope, strongly indicat
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document claims to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques" (the EDPB didn't exist until 2018), and adopts a radical position — declaring pseudonymized data entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders — that contradicts established EDPB/CJEU reasoning and Recital 26, making it almost certainly AI-generated fabrication.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document purports to be from a future date (March 2026), misattributes a 2014 guidance to the EDPB (which was established in 2018), and adopts an implausibly radical position removing pseudonymized data from GDPR scope, strongly indicating AI-generated fabrication.
